name: agent-harness
description: The agent-harness machine: self-hosting AI-native dev harness skills and the porting toolchain.

plugins.name: agent-harness
plugins.description: ExecPlans, taste lints, review-persona gates, docs-as-memory, and the harness-init porting toolchain (skills: execplan, harness-lint, docs-tree, docs-nav, product-design, harness-init, architecture-setup, garden) for minimum human-in-loop development.

plugins.name: agent-harness-workspace
plugins.description: Vendored OpenAI Symphony worker skills (Apache-2.0): git/PR/Linear execution flows (skills: commit, push, pull, land, debug, linear) installed into a Director worker's workspace and shared by the Codex and Claude worker runtimes.
